title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the biggest race of the autumn season:
the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think, Trainer? Am I looking
ultra-sharp?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's my big day! Gotta show off how much I've
grown!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I trained and trained and finally made it here!
choice_data_list: Seems like your resolve has grown stronger too.
Seems like your resolve has grown stronger too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe. And you've grown a lot more trainer-like!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm off! I'm gonna give it everything I've got!
